title: Grammar Lesson Schema
description: Schema for defining grammar lessons in the French Language Coach application. Each lesson contains metadata and structured content sections with examples.

title.description: Title of the lesson section (e.g., 'Regular -ER Verbs', 'Conjugation Table')

content.description: The main content/text of the section. Should be a complete explanation or description.

examples.description: List of example strings that illustrate the concept being taught. Each example should be a string.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the lesson, used for filtering and recommendation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the lesson. Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, starting with a letter (e.g., 'present-tense', 'articles-basics').

title.description: Human-readable title of the lesson (e.g., 'The Present Tense in French', 'French Articles: Definite and Indefinite').

topic.description: The grammatical topic/category this lesson belongs to (e.g., 'Verbs', 'Nouns', 'Adjectives', 'Pronouns', 'Conjunctions').

sections.description: Array of content sections that make up the lesson. Each section contains a title, content, and optional examples.
